requirement_topic.en: Cordless Tool Lithium Battery Safety, NTC Radio Approval, and Transport: Philippine Expectations Versus China GB Battery Rules
requirement_topic.zh: 无绳工具锂电池安全、NTC无线电核准及运输：菲律宾要求对比中国GB电池规则
requirement_topic.zht: 無繩工具鋰電池安全、NTC無線電核准及運輸：菲律賓要求對比中國GB電池規則

summary.en: For cordless power tools, the Philippine file should address lithium-ion battery pack and charger safety, the type approval of any built-in radio module, and lithium-battery transport. Battery and charger safety are assessed against the IEC 62133 battery cell and pack standard and the IEC 62841 tool requirements, supported where in scope by a BPS ICC. Any wireless feature such as Bluetooth in the tool or charger requires NTC type approval and equipment registration before importation. Lithium batteries shipped to Manila or Subic must also meet UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods transport rules for the chosen mode.
summary.zh: 对于无绳电动工具，菲律宾文件应处理锂离子电池组和充电器安全、任何内置无线电模块的型号核准及锂电池运输。电池和充电器安全依据IEC 62133电池单体和电池组标准及IEC 62841工具要求评估，在范围内由BPS ICC支持。工具或充电器中任何无线功能如蓝牙，须在进口前取得NTC型号核准和设备注册。运往马尼拉或苏比克的锂电池还须满足UN 38.3及所选运输方式的危险货物运输规则。
summary.zht: 對於無繩電動工具，菲律賓文件應處理鋰離子電池組和充電器安全、任何內置無線電模組的型號核准及鋰電池運輸。電池和充電器安全依據IEC 62133電池單體和電池組標準及IEC 62841工具要求評估，在範圍內由BPS ICC支持。工具或充電器中任何無線功能如藍牙，須在進口前取得NTC型號核准和設備註冊。運往馬尼拉或蘇比克的鋰電池還須滿足UN 38.3及所選運輸方式的危險貨物運輸規則。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133 (secondary lithium cells and batteries) and IEC 62841 charger and tool requirements
NTC type approval and equipment registration for any radio module in the tool or charger
UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods transport rules (IATA or IMDG) for lithium-battery shipment
BPS ICC where the cordless tool or charger is within mandatory scope

summary.en: Chinese cordless tool batteries are usually built to GB 31241 for portable-electronic lithium battery safety and to GB/T 18287 or related cell standards, with chargers under GB 4706 or the GB/T 3883 tool series, and CCC where listed. Radio modules are approved through the China SRRC type approval. UN 38.3 is already standard for export shipment. These are strong technical equivalents but the Chinese SRRC radio approval and CCC do not substitute for NTC approval or a BPS ICC.
summary.zh: 中国无绳工具电池通常按GB 31241便携式电子产品锂电池安全及GB/T 18287或相关电芯标准制造，充电器按GB 4706或GB/T 3883工具系列，列入目录者加CCC。无线电模块经中国SRRC型号核准。UN 38.3对出口货运已属常规。这些是有力的技术对应，但中国SRRC无线电核准和CCC不替代NTC核准或BPS ICC。
summary.zht: 中國無繩工具電池通常按GB 31241便攜式電子產品鋰電池安全及GB/T 18287或相關電芯標準製造，充電器按GB 4706或GB/T 3883工具系列，列入目錄者加CCC。無線電模組經中國SRRC型號核准。UN 38.3對出口貨運已屬常規。這些是有力的技術對應，但中國SRRC無線電核准和CCC不替代NTC核准或BPS ICC。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 (portable electronic lithium battery safety) and GB/T 18287 cell references
GB 4706 or GB/T 3883 charger requirements; CCC where listed
China SRRC radio type approval; UN 38.3 for export

gap.en: The exporter should re-test or cross-map the battery and charger to IEC 62133 and IEC 62841 in a BPS-acceptable laboratory, file a separate NTC type approval for any wireless module because the Chinese SRRC approval does not carry over, and keep the UN 38.3 report plus the correct dangerous-goods declaration for each shipment mode. A common failure is shipping a cordless kit assuming SRRC and CCC suffice, then being blocked at NTC or BPS.
gap.zh: 出口商应在BPS可接受的实验室对电池和充电器按IEC 62133和IEC 62841重新检测或交叉映射，为任何无线模块单独申报NTC型号核准（因中国SRRC核准不可沿用），并为每种运输方式保留UN 38.3报告及正确的危险货物申报。常见失败是假定SRRC和CCC足够便发运无绳套装，结果在NTC或BPS受阻。
gap.zht: 出口商應在BPS可接受的實驗室對電池和充電器按IEC 62133和IEC 62841重新檢測或交叉映射，為任何無線模組單獨申報NTC型號核准（因中國SRRC核准不可沿用），並為每種運輸方式保留UN 38.3報告及正確的危險貨物申報。常見失敗是假定SRRC和CCC足夠便發運無繩套裝，結果在NTC或BPS受阻。

mandatory_status.target: NTC type approval mandatory for any radio module; UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods rules mandatory for lithium-battery transport; battery and charger safety mandatory where the cordless tool or charger is in BPS ICC scope
mandatory_status.cn: GB 31241 and SRRC radio approval mandatory for in-scope products; CCC mandatory where catalogue-listed; UN 38.3 required for export shipment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For cordless tools the exporter should plan IEC 62133 and IEC 62841 battery and charger evidence acceptable to BPS, a separate NTC type approval for any radio module, and UN 38.3 transport documentation; Chinese GB, SRRC, and CCC evidence is a starting point, not a substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对无绳工具，出口商应规划BPS可接受的IEC 62133和IEC 62841电池及充电器证据、任何无线模块单独的NTC型号核准，以及UN 38.3运输文件；中国GB、SRRC和CCC证据是起点而非替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對無繩工具，出口商應規劃BPS可接受的IEC 62133和IEC 62841電池及充電器證據、任何無線模組單獨的NTC型號核准，以及UN 38.3運輸文件；中國GB、SRRC和CCC證據是起點而非替代。

requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances and Battery End-of-Life: Philippine RA 6969 and Ecological Solid Waste Versus China RoHS and Battery Rules
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质与电池报废：菲律宾RA 6969及生态固废对比中国RoHS和电池规则
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質與電池報廢：菲律賓RA 6969及生態固廢對比中國RoHS和電池規則

summary.en: The Philippines does not run a single power-tool RoHS product mark, but hazardous substances and battery end-of-life are governed by environmental law: the Toxic Substances and Hazardous and Nuclear Wastes Control Act (RA 6969) administered by DENR-EMB restricts certain chemicals and controls hazardous waste, and the Ecological Solid Waste Management Act (RA 9003) and extended producer responsibility under the EPR Act (RA 11898) bring obligations on packaging and on used batteries. An exporter should ensure the tool restricts heavy metals consistent with international RoHS practice, provides a safety data position where needed, and supports importer-side battery and packaging recovery duties.
summary.zh: 菲律宾不设单一的电动工具RoHS产品标识，但有害物质和电池报废受环境法管辖：由DENR-EMB管理的有毒物质及有害和核废物控制法（RA 6969）限制某些化学品并管控有害废物，生态固体废物管理法（RA 9003）及EPR法（RA 11898）下的延伸生产者责任带来包装和废电池义务。出口商应确保工具按国际RoHS实践限制重金属，必要时提供安全数据立场，并支持进口商侧的电池和包装回收责任。
summary.zht: 菲律賓不設單一的電動工具RoHS產品標識，但有害物質和電池報廢受環境法管轄：由DENR-EMB管理的有毒物質及有害和核廢物控制法（RA 6969）限制某些化學品並管控有害廢物，生態固體廢物管理法（RA 9003）及EPR法（RA 11898）下的延伸生產者責任帶來包裝和廢電池義務。出口商應確保工具按國際RoHS實踐限制重金屬，必要時提供安全數據立場，並支持進口商側的電池和包裝回收責任。

standards_or_laws: Toxic Substances and Hazardous and Nuclear Wastes Control Act (RA 6969), DENR-EMB
Extended Producer Responsibility Act (RA 11898) for packaging and producer take-back
International RoHS-style heavy-metal restriction as good practice

summary.en: China controls hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products through China RoHS (the administrative measure GB/T 26572 limits plus the marking and disclosure rules), and handles waste batteries and WEEE through Chinese recycling regulations. So a China-built tool typically already has a RoHS substance position and a battery disposal framework, but these are Chinese administrative instruments, not the Philippine RA 6969, RA 9003, or RA 11898 obligations.
summary.zh: 中国通过中国RoHS（管理办法、GB/T 26572限值及标识与披露规则）管控电子电气产品有害物质，并通过中国回收法规处理废电池和WEEE。故中国制造的工具通常已有RoHS物质立场和电池处置框架，但这些是中国行政手段，并非菲律宾RA 6969、RA 9003或RA 11898义务。
summary.zht: 中國通過中國RoHS（管理辦法、GB/T 26572限值及標識與披露規則）管控電子電氣產品有害物質，並通過中國回收法規處理廢電池和WEEE。故中國製造的工具通常已有RoHS物質立場和電池處置框架，但這些是中國行政手段，並非菲律賓RA 6969、RA 9003或RA 11898義務。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS administrative measure and GB/T 26572 limits with marking and disclosure
Chinese waste battery and WEEE recycling regulations

gap.en: The exporter can reuse the China RoHS material declarations and supplier substance data as evidence, but should re-frame them against Philippine environmental law and ensure the importer is set up for RA 11898 producer responsibility on packaging and for compliant handling of used lithium batteries under RA 6969 and RA 9003. There is no single Philippine RoHS mark to print, so the duty is documentary and importer-side rather than a label on the tool.
gap.zh: 出口商可复用中国RoHS材料声明和供应商物质数据作为证据，但应将其按菲律宾环境法重新表述，并确保进口商就RA 11898包装生产者责任及依RA 6969和RA 9003对废锂电池的合规处理做好安排。菲律宾没有单一RoHS标识可印制，故义务是文件性和进口商侧的，而非工具上的标签。
gap.zht: 出口商可復用中國RoHS材料聲明和供應商物質數據作為證據，但應將其按菲律賓環境法重新表述，並確保進口商就RA 11898包裝生產者責任及依RA 6969和RA 9003對廢鋰電池的合規處理做好安排。菲律賓沒有單一RoHS標識可印製，故義務是文件性和進口商側的，而非工具上的標籤。

mandatory_status.target: RA 6969, RA 9003, and RA 11898 are mandatory environmental laws affecting substances, waste, packaging, and battery take-back; there is no single mandatory RoHS product mark for power tools
mandatory_status.cn: China RoHS marking and disclosure mandatory for listed electrical and electronic products; waste battery and WEEE recycling rules mandatory for in-scope producers

source.publisher: Environmental Management Bureau, Department of Environment and Natural Resources (Philippines)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] There is no single Philippine RoHS mark for power tools; the exporter should reuse China RoHS substance declarations as evidence while ensuring the importer meets RA 6969, RA 9003, and RA 11898 obligations on substances, waste, packaging, and battery take-back.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾对电动工具无单一RoHS标识；出口商应复用中国RoHS物质声明作为证据，同时确保进口商满足RA 6969、RA 9003和RA 11898关于物质、废物、包装和电池回收的义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓對電動工具無單一RoHS標識；出口商應復用中國RoHS物質聲明作為證據，同時確保進口商滿足RA 6969、RA 9003和RA 11898關於物質、廢物、包裝和電池回收的義務。
